member.name: T:SpMSSqlPush.IConnectionContext
member.summary: An interface to a connection context for accessing a remote SocketPro server.

member.name: P:SpMSSqlPush.IConnectionContext.IpAddress
member.summary: An IP address to a remote SocketPro server like '111.222.212.121', 'www.mydomain.com', or 'MyServerName'

member.name: P:SpMSSqlPush.IConnectionContext.Port
member.summary: A remote SocketPro server port number.

member.name: P:SpMSSqlPush.IConnectionContext.UserId
member.summary: A case in-sensitive user id string.

member.name: P:SpMSSqlPush.IConnectionContext.Zip
member.summary: Enable or disable online compression. It defaults to false.

member.name: P:SpMSSqlPush.IConnectionContext.EncryptionMethod
member.summary: Encryption method used for data transaction between a remote SocketPro server and SQL server. It defaults to no encryption.

member.name: T:SpMSSqlPush.Messenger
member.summary: A sealed class exposing two static methods for sending messages through SocketPro.

member.name: F:SpMSSqlPush.Messenger.MSG_CONNECT_SOCKET
member.summary: A structure of connection context for accessing a remote SocketPro server

member.name: M:SpMSSqlPush.Messenger.SendUserMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Send a message onto one given user.

member.name: M:SpMSSqlPush.Messenger.IsConnected
member.summary: Check if there is a connection to a remote SocketPro server available.
member.returns: True if connected. Otherwise, it is false.

member.name: M:SpMSSqlPush.Messenger.Connect(System.String)
member.summary: Build a connection to a given remote SocketPro server.
member.param: A connection string to a remote SocketPro server like 'server=myserver;port=20901;pwd=PassOne;uid=SocketPro;zip=0;encryption=0'. If the connection string is null or empty, a previous connection string will be used.

member.name: M:SpMSSqlPush.Messenger.Disconnect
member.summary: Close a connection to a remote SocketPro server.

member.name: M:SpMSSqlPush.Messenger.Notify(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Send a message onto one or more groups of clients.
member.param: An arry of chat group ids like '1,2,3,15,......'.
